description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and on pull requests when opened, reopened, reviewed, or edited. Use a matrix job that tests on ubuntu-latest with multiple Python versions (3.8 to 3.12), checking out the repository, setting up Python with the specified version and architecture, installing requirements, running tests with coverage, uploading the coverage report to Codecov, and running linters Flake8 and Mypy.
